# Refresher and other resources

On this page we link to a few resources on what the pre-requisite knowledge for the rest of this course.

::: {.callout}
### Unix command line and bash scripting

- [Introduction to the CLI](https://pmoris.github.io/FiMAB-bioinformatics/content/unix/1-unix-intro.html)

Be sure to check out the various other resources linked on [this page](https://pmoris.github.io/FiMAB-bioinformatics/content/unix/1-unix-intro.html#resources).

For a more interactive learning experience, you can try [https://sandbox.bio/](https://sandbox.bio/).

:::
